_comment: Drop this file (renamed to hidemymods-spoof.json) into the Minecraft instance's working directory, or point hidemymods.spoof.file system property at its absolute path. The 'id' values are Forge mod IDs (lowercase, no spaces) -- NOT display names. Extract them from the target server's pack manifest or from each mod jar's mcmod.info modid field. Order is preserved on the wire.
